name: ib-t007-llamacpp-calibration
description: IB-T007 CPU reference-tool calibration: short synthetic prompts, short directed completions, low offered rate (single-slot llama-server -np 1, mean inter-arrival >> mean service time) so queueing delay stays negligible and each request is effectively an isolated single-request measurement -- comparable in shape to the independent Python reference client (docs/evidence/ib-t007/refclient.py) run against the same llama-server process.
